query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `label_scan_cartons` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `sessionId` int NOT NULL, `barcode` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `labelFileId` int, `dispatched` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `dispatchedAt` timestamp NULL, `hasException` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `exceptionReason` varchar(64), `exceptionDetail` text, `exceptionResolvedBy` varchar(256), `exceptionResolvedAt` timestamp NULL, `qcItemCount` int, `qcPhotos` json, `qcNotes` text, `scannedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `label_scan_cartons_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
